name: work-suite
description: The workflow primitive for orchestrator agents: ideate, plan, execute, merge, stay in turn while waiting, and run no-human-gates full-delivery autopilot loops.

interface.shortDescription: Ideation, planning, doing, merging, and autonomous execution skills.
interface.longDescription: Work Suite packages the canonical Ourostack workflow skills for Codex and other agent runtimes: work-ideator, work-planner, work-doer, work-merger, autopilot, stay-in-turn, and inch-worm. Autopilot mode means no human gates, harsh sub-agent reviewer gates, explicit terminal deployment/validation state, in-turn CI/deploy wait discipline, Arc/resume continuity for context loss, and an exit preflight that writes down the durable continuation scan and keeps selecting ready follow-up work until the queue is truly empty.
defaultPrompt: Run this in autopilot: keep building through merge, deploy, smoke, cleanup, and durable continuation until no sensible ready work remains.
